shortDescription: Left rail (shaded): contact, skills & education by sectionOrder. Main column: summary, experience, projects. Word export uses the same split, tokens, and rail styling as PDF preview.
description: Rail order for skills vs education follows sectionOrder from the editor (Organize). Main column uses sectionOrder among summary, experience, projects. Education uses build_education_entry_rail in the rail only; Word mirrors layout with a two-column table.
